auth.disclaimer: By signing in you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

errors.displayNameMinLength: display name must be at least 3 characters
errors.displayNameLettersOnly: display name can only contain letters
errors.usernameMinLength: username must be at least 3 characters
errors.usernameInvalidChars: username can only contain letters, numbers, periods and underscores.
errors.usernameNoLeadingPeriod: username cannot start with a period.
errors.usernameNoTrailingPeriod: username cannot end with a period.
errors.dobMinAge: you must be at least {{age}} years old to use Szpont
errors.dobMaxAge: you must be at most {{age}} years old to use Szpont

welcome.slide6Privacy: We only process your location when you're in one of the active meetup zones. Your data stays private.
